description: SimpliVPN is a VPN service and a white-label VPN backend/API offering that lets businesses create and manage their own VPN applications and users. It provides hosted VPN infrastructure, user management, and server information through its API.
summary: SimpliVPN exposes one documented HTTP API, SimpliVPN API, with an OpenAPI spec at `https://api.simplivpn.net/swagger/v1/swagger.json` (also mirrored by APIs.guru). It uses either a user bearer token obtained from `POST /login` or an admin API key supplied through SimpliVPN onboarding for admin routes.
